source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.3
distilled_thesis: The remembered sun's ten-year ascent to the cave frames the route's reciprocity: light has long approached the secluded life it now addresses.
